meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Learn to use Claude Code skills and Antigravity to generate high-revenue SaaS ideas and build them rapidly. Beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: Overcome the paralysis of 'no project ideas' by leveraging Claude Code to analyze high-intent search trends and market gaps. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding, you transform abstract market research into a functional, revenue-ready MVP, drastically reducing your time-to-market while ensuring the product solves a real, paid user pain point.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You know you want to build a SaaS, but you are trapped in the 'no project ideas' purgatory, watching competitors ship while you iterate on nothing. This isn't a lack of creativity; it is a lack of a systematic feedback loop between market data and execution.

Today, we break that cycle. By combining the analytical power of Claude Code with the structural velocity of Antigravity, you will stop guessing and start engineering. This isn't just about writing code; it is about building a business machine that validates and executes simultaneously.

steps.title: Market Gap Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan top-performing SaaS categories and identify 'negative sentiment' niches where users are frustrated by existing legacy tools.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current top 100 SaaS categories on ProductHunt and identify 3 niches with high user complaint density regarding pricing or complexity.

steps.title: MVP Feature Scoping
steps.description: Define the minimum set of features that solve the core problem identified in step one, ensuring high value with low development overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an MVP feature list for a SaaS that solves [Niche]. Focus on one core 'Aha!' moment and exclude all secondary features.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate the project structure using Antigravity to ensure your codebase follows industry-standard patterns for scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase project structure for the identified MVP, including authentication and stripe integration.

steps.title: Database Schema Design
steps.description: Map your business logic to a robust database schema that supports rapid iteration and user growth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for this SaaS MVP that handles user profiles, billing subscriptions, and core data entities.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Execute the build phase by instructing Claude Code to implement individual modules based on the architectural plan.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the implementation for the authentication flow using the previously defined schema. Ensure best security practices.

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate unit tests before implementation to ensure your MVP doesn't crumble under early user traffic.
Use Antigravity to generate 'mock data' scripts immediately; it helps visualize your dashboard UI before the backend is fully functional.
Constrain Claude Code by providing a 'tech debt budget' in your prompts to prevent over-engineering during the MVP phase.
When stuck on a feature, ask Claude to 'explain the trade-offs' between two different tech stacks to save days of trial and error.
Treat your project documentation as a living requirement file; update it via Claude every time you pivot based on early user feedback.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a landing page with a waitlist to capture emails. Use that feedback to refine your next release cycle using Claude Code.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum. Start building for a market that is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
